title: viola crassa var. yatsugatakeana
intro: Viola crassa var. yatsugatakeana, also known as Yatsugatake viola, is a variant of the Viola crassa plant species, a type of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Japanese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Viola crassa var. yatsugatakeana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a salve or tincture.
